close_reasons.bd-63x3v.7.1: Completed: added pi.swarm.action_plan.v1 dry-run projection, contract, CLI output, replay scenario assertions for ready/empty/deferred/dirty/degraded/RCH/stale/validation-failure cases, and command safety classes.
close_reasons.bd-63x3v.7.2: Completed: added fail-closed pi.swarm.work_admission_gate.v1 projection, contract, CLI output, and E2E replay assertions for ready/open/deferred, degraded Mail/RCH, dirty worktree, stale evidence, malformed source, and validation failure cases.
close_reasons.bd-63x3v.7.3: Completed: added dry-run per-agent budget lease simulator, contract, and fixture-backed stable JSON self-tests for fair allocation, over-commit rejection, stale lease expiry, mixed-priority allocation, RCH saturation, and provider budget exhaustion.
close_reasons.bd-63x3v.7.4: Completed: added deterministic pi.swarm.turn_pressure_ledger.v1 runpack section, contract, markdown/next-action integration, and golden-backed self-test coverage for normal turns, large tool artifact spillover, compaction admission pressure, provider reroute, TUI frame pressure, and session write backpressure.
close_reasons.bd-63x3v.7.5: Completed: added no-network extension quarantine and rollback rehearsal CLI, contract, and fixture self-tests covering startup/runtime crash quarantine, permission escalation rejection, stale provenance, trusted rollback selection, action-plan projection, and fail-closed missing policy/provenance.
close_reasons.bd-63x3v.7.6: Completed: added deterministic operator handoff summary CLI, contract, and fixture self-tests covering clean handoff, dirty worktree, unpushed commits, expired reservations, stale evidence, failed validation, redaction, and JSON/Markdown output.
close_reasons.bd-63x3v.7.7: Completed: added deterministic pi.swarm.stale_evidence_renewal_queue.v1 scanner, contract, fixture self-tests for fresh/expired/missing-source/contract-drift/RCH-blocked/safe-command scenarios, and optional runpack/action-plan integration that recommends renew_stale_evidence without mutating evidence or weakening drop-in gates.
close_reasons.bd-63x3v.7.8: Completed: documented the fourth-wave self-healing operator workflow in the swarm runbook and README, including dry-run action planner, work-admission stop gate, budget leases, turn pressure ledger, extension quarantine rehearsal, handoff summaries, stale-evidence renewal, claim boundaries, and safe handoff wording that preserves human confirmation and release-claim gates.

checklist.requirement: All fourth-wave implementation and docs child Beads are closed before closeout.

checklist.requirement: Every fourth-wave child bead maps to pushed commits, source paths, validation commands, and claim-boundary text.
Dry-run action planner contract, implementation, and docs are present.
Stop-admitting-work gate is fail-closed and documented as advisory guidance.
Budget lease simulator has contract, fixtures, self-test, and no runtime enforcement claim.
Turn pressure ledger is generated into the runpack and bounded to diagnostic claims.
Extension quarantine rehearsal covers quarantine, rollback, blocked provenance, and operator confirmation boundaries.
Operator handoff summaries remain redacted, advisory, and bounded to source-status handoff.
Stale evidence renewal queue is read-only, contract-backed, fixture-tested, and preserves drop-in claim gates.
README and runbook document fourth-wave workflow, human confirmation points, and closeout artifacts.

evidence.boundary: Beads issue state and comments remain the work ledger.
Agent Mail reservations and messages coordinate agents but do not replace Beads, source review, or validation gates.
Action plans and handoff artifacts are dry-run guidance only.
The work admission gate can stop new implementation admission procedurally but does not enforce runtime throttles.
Mutating Beads, Agent Mail, extension configuration, git refs, or evidence files requires explicit human operator execution.
The stale-evidence queue recommends renewal commands but does not regenerate or overwrite evidence.
Heavy Cargo validation must prove RCH execution.
Staged UBS remains mandatory before commit.
Beads ledger reconciliation remains mandatory before commit.
Fourth-wave self-healing evidence does not authorize release, benchmark, capacity, performance, or strict drop-in wording.
The closeout gate summarizes child evidence and does not replace source contracts, tests, docs, or pushed commits.

checklist.requirement: Closeout source boundaries preserve Beads, Agent Mail, dry-run, human-confirmation, RCH, UBS, ledger, and release-claim authorities.
All prerequisite child commits are pushed to origin/main and legacy origin/master before final closeout generation.

provided_quality_gates.command: python3 scripts/simulate_swarm_budget_leases.py --self-test && python3 scripts/rehearse_extension_quarantine.py --self-test && python3 scripts/summarize_operator_handoff.py --self-test && python3 scripts/build_stale_evidence_renewal_queue.py --self-test

checklist.requirement: Required closeout quality gates passed, with every Cargo/Rust validation gate run through RCH.

claim_boundaries.allowed_claim: advisory fourth-wave self-healing closeout evidence only

known_limitations: Fourth-wave self-healing artifacts are advisory dry-run operator evidence only.
The work admission gate does not enforce runtime throttles or mutate Beads, Agent Mail, RCH, git, extension configuration, or evidence files.
Mutating commands recommended by action plans, handoff summaries, quarantine rehearsal, or stale-evidence renewal require explicit human operator execution.
This closeout does not authorize release, benchmark, capacity, performance, or strict drop-in claims.

parent_epic.title: Swarm self-healing operator action fourth-wave roadmap
